org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Interface BitmapExporter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ImageIOBitmapExporter

    public interface BitmapExporter
    This interface represents exporters into graphic formats such as GIF, JPEG...
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Marc BAUMGARTNER
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      boolean isShadowExported()
      Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setShadowExported(boolean export)
      Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      boolean write(OutputStream stream, ViewComponentContainer<?,?> container, float scale)
      Exports the file.

    • Method Detail

      • getProgression

        Progression getProgression()
        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

      • setProgression

        void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • isShadowExported

        boolean isShadowExported()
        Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Returns:
        true if the shadows of the objects are also exported.

      • setShadowExported

        void setShadowExported(boolean export)
        Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Parameters:
        export - is true if the shadows of the objects are exported.

      • write

        boolean write(OutputStream stream,
            ViewComponentContainer<?,?> container,
            float scale)
              throws IOException
        Exports the file.
        Parameters:
        stream - the output
        container - is the container of view componets to export.
        scale - is the scaling factor from the model coordinate system to the pixels of the procuded image. For example, a value of 2 means that the produced image will be 2 times larger than the exported model.
        Returns:
        success status.
        Throws:
        IOException
